file_name: Smile Partners Australia - Mehta Orthodontics - Questionnaire.pdf

questions.text: Outline any concerns regarding the impact of the Acquisition on competition, including if SPA’s Bachmeyer Orthodontic Clinic and Brace5 Orthodontics clinics are close competitors of Mehta Orthodontics and there are not many alternatives.
Provide any additional information or comments that you consider relevant to the ACCC’s assessment of the Acquisition.

Provide a brief description of your business or organisation, including any commercial relationships with Smile Partners Australia (including its Bachmayer Orthodontic Clinic and/or Brace5 Orthodontics) and/or Mehta Orthodontics.
